div.h1: Memory Layout: SIMD Page Boundary Hazard

p.strong: Technical Spec: SIMD reads must not cross page boundaries into unmapped memory.

div.p: "1. Instruction": " MOVUPS xmm, [0x4FFF]" 2. Split Load: MMU requests 16B. "3. Crossing: Bytes [1": "15] fall in Page 5." 4. Exception: MMU detects unmapped Page 5. 5. Result: CPU traps to OS -> SIGSEGV.

ul.li: Step 2: Load from aligned_ptr (Safe: Page size is multiple of 16)
Step 3: Use PEXTRB or bit-shifts to extract target byte.
